text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mmm-mm, Italian food is so delicious! There's
pasta, risotto, Neapolitan pizza... And then
tiramisu and panna cotta for dessert!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I can't leave out the Belgian waffles. Oh, and
don't forget the orange smoothie! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sugar is energy, so it's okay to have as long as I
burn it off later! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, look at all this food! It looks so delicious!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Teehee! It certainly does, doesn't it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's amazing that you can eat so much and stay fit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I have to work out more so I can eat as much as
you without gaining weight!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I can't go on like this...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to get even more ultra-hyped up
than usual today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I can't betray the expectations of Spe and
everyone else who looks up to me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
A hot rod not only has to run great, but it has to
look great too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Motivated by everyone's expectations,
Maruzensky successfully maintains a healthy diet.
